meta.title: Welcome
meta.contentTruncated:
Next Dev Portal has built-in blogging feature.

Just create an `*.mdx` file under `/content/blog` directory. 
Then run the generator too `yarn gen:collections` and you are good to go!

Regular blog authors can be added to `authors.yml`. (Thanks Docusaurus for the idea!)

meta.title: MDX blog with a relatively long title
meta.contentFull:
With [MDX](https://mdxjs.com/) you can embed JSX in the markdown file.


```js
<button onClick={() => alert('button clicked!')}>Click me!</button>
```

<button className="p-2  rounded-md text-blue-500" onClick={() => alert('button clicked!')}>Click me!</button>
